title: AGRICULTURAL KNOWLEDGE: LINKING FARMERS, ADVISORS AND RESEARCHERS TO BOOST INNOVATION
subtitle: Agricultural advice addressing the challenges of going online
description: A practice abstract from AgriLink detailing the Latvian Living Lab’s creation of an online platform to aggregate publicly available horticultural processing resources for farmers. It emphasizes co-creation with advisors to ensure the platform meets user needs and addresses barriers posed by traditional personal advisory relationships and limited digital proficiency.
